name: VersionNumber.Branch
summary: Build branch, set by the build process.

enum_values.name: Developer
enum_values.summary: Private developer build; should never be released to the public.

enum_values.name: Trunk
enum_values.summary: Mainline trunk build. May be released to the public.

enum_values.name: ReleaseCandidate
enum_values.summary: Release candidate build. Will be released to the public.

enum_values.name: Release
enum_values.summary: Final Release build. Will be released to the public.
